Started new hobby working with natural environment. Has small yard, wants to maximize space with raised beds and vertical gardening.
Growing easy vegetables: lettuce (20 days), spinach (20-30 days), kale, cherry tomatoes, patio tomatoes. Herbs: basil, cilantro, mint.
Basil: 4-6 hrs sun, consistent moisture, 65-75F, monthly fertilizer, pinch flower buds. Mint: partial shade, moist soil, 60-70F, less fertilization.
Using organic pest control: row covers, fine-mesh screens, natural predators (ladybugs, lacewings, mantis), neem oil, insecticidal soap, pyrethrin spray, companion planting.
Basil companions: tomatoes (flavor improvement), marigold (nematode control), oregano, borage, chives. Helps repel pests naturally.
Implementing crop rotation 4-year plan: Year 1 basil, Year 2 mint, Year 3 cilantro/cover crop, Year 4 tomatoes/return to basil with improved soil.
